Package dk.tij.jissuesystem.core

package dk.tij.jissuesystem.core
Core functionality for issue reporting and management.

This package includes:

  • IssueReporter - a high-level reporter that handles labels, diagnostics, and dispatching issues to providers.
  • IssueProviderFactory - a factory to create IIssueProvider implementations
  • LabelContract - defines required and allowed labels for a repository

Developers typically interact with this package to initialise reporters and submit issues programmatically

Since:
0.2.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.tij.jissuesystem
    The root package for the JIssueSystem library.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.api
    Contains the public API interfaces and data classes for the JIssueSystem library.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.provider
    Contains provider types and implementations for external issue trackers.
    dk.tij.jissuesystem.utils
    Utility classes for JIssueSystem.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    IssueProviderFactory
    Factory for creating IIssueProvider instances.
    IssueReporter
    High-level utility for reporting issues to a repository via an IIssueProvider.
    IssueReporter.Builder
    Builder class for IssueReporter with fluent API.
    LabelContract
    Represents a contract of required labels for a repository.
